name: ConwayLightSim
description: A cellular automaton web simulator inspired by Conway's Game of Life, featuring interactive editing, real-time simulation, reactive audio and more.

name: AetherType
description: A distraction-free, local-first writing environment that makes writing a pleasant experience. Step into the aether and write without limits.

name: LatentSpace
description: A web application that allows you to explore the latent space representation of a set of words using a open-source embedding model and PCA analysis.
